acceptance_gates.evidence: 147 launch-readiness JSON/Markdown/CSV artifacts scanned across 36829 lines.
Commercial confidence, market niche, competitive positioning, prediction science, buyer, hosted, and enterprise gates are readable.
0 unsupported high-risk claim mentions; 489 mentions are in blocked/prohibited/caveated contexts.

release_holds.evidence_needed: Rerun this validator whenever buyer calls, hosted proof, enterprise evidence, or resolved forecast data changes claim eligibility.
Owner-approved external-share copy review before outreach, decks, or public claims.

proof_boundary: This validator checks whether generated launch-readiness artifacts keep high-risk commercial, buyer, hosted, enterprise, competitive, and prediction claims inside blocked/prohibited/caveated contexts. It does not prove buyer demand, hosted readiness, enterprise procurement readiness, or prediction accuracy.
